name: @narumitw/pi-statusline
description: Pi extension that replaces the footer with an information-rich statusline.

scripts.check: biome check --vcs-use-ignore-file=false src test package.json tsconfig.json README.md && npm run typecheck
scripts.format: biome check --write --vcs-use-ignore-file=false src test package.json tsconfig.json README.md
